ddls:
CREATE TABLE "farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the farm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streets" (
  "street_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each street segment */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Name of the street segment */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the street segment */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop grown on the street segment */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the farm this street segment belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("street_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streets_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop type */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "planting_duration" INTEGER /* Typical duration for planting (in days) */,
  "harvest_duration" INTEGER /* Typical duration for harvest (in days) */,
  "growth_stages" TEXT /* Description of the different growth stages for this crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "street_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the street segment this yield data belongs to */,
  "strt1" INTEGER /* Growth metric for street segment 1 */,
  "strt2" INTEGER /* Growth metric for street segment 2 */,
  "strt3" INTEGER /* Growth metric for street segment 3 */,
  "strt4" INTEGER /* Growth metric for street segment 4 */,
  "dryM" INTEGER /* Dry matter measurement for month M */,
  "dryJn" INTEGER /* Dry matter measurement for month Jn */,
  "dryJl" INTEGER /* Dry matter measurement for month Jl */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End measurement for the growing season */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the growing period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_yields_street_id FOREIGN KEY ("street_id") REFERENCES streets ("street_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, farmer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the yield data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_yield_id FOREIGN KEY ("yield_id") REFERENCES crop_yields ("yield_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the environmental condition record */,
  "street_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the street segment this condition record belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the growing season */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity during the growing season */,
  "rainfall" REAL /* Total rainfall during the growing season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_street_id FOREIGN KEY ("street_id") REFERENCES streets ("street_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth stage */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the crop this growth stage belongs to */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the growth stage */,
  "stage_description" TEXT /* Description of the growth stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_stages_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth record */,
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the yield data this growth record belongs to */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the growth stage */,
  "stage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the growth stage */,
  "stage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the growth stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_records_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES growth_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_growth_records_yield_id FOREIGN KEY ("yield_id") REFERENCES crop_yields ("yield_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the yield data this report is based on */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings from the analysis */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_yield_id FOREIGN KEY ("yield_id") REFERENCES crop_yields ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
